turns.content: What brings you in today?
These headaches keep coming back. They're bad enough to mess with my work. And I get dizzy spells too.
When did this start?
'Bout a week and a half ago, maybe two. Just kinda snuck up on me.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's like a dull ache, right across the front of my head. Sometimes it makes me feel sick to my stomach.
Have you had any fever or chills?
Nah, no fever. Just the headache and dizziness. No chills either.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just that blood pressure pill. Lisinopril, I think it's called.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yeah, I got high blood pressure. Been on that pill for a few years now.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No, I'm not allergic to anything as far as I know.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Just some ibuprofen when it gets real bad. Doesn't help much though. And I take my blood pressure pill like normal.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Working in the warehouse makes it worse. All that lifting and moving around. Resting helps a little, but it don't go away.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Makes it hard to focus on my job. I get dizzy picking up boxes, and the headache just wears me down. Boss ain't too happy about my pace lately.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
I smoke. And I'll have a few beers on weekends, nothing heavy.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Don't think so. Nobody ever talked about it. Just gonna say I don't know.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
Not like this. I get headaches sometimes, but never this bad or this long. This feels different.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yeah, I get it. So what do you think is going on with me?
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physical? It's like a 6 or 7, steady ache. Emotionally, I'm just frustrated and tired of dealing with it. Dizziness makes
Do you have any questions for me?
You think it's serious? And what can you give me to stop these headaches? I need to get back to work.
What do you think might be going on?
I dunno, that's your job to figure out. Could be my blood pressure acting up again, or something else. It just hurts and won't stop.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No, that's pretty much it. Just hoping you can do something about it.
